name: obsidian-covenant
theme: Dark fantasy roleplay guild. IC and OOC separated; RP realms gated behind the Knight rank per RP community convention; lore and laws read-only; a low-commitment tavern RP channel for newcomers.

channels.name: herald-board
channels.topic: Proclamations from the Covenant. Events, judgments, tidings.

channels.name: codex-of-laws
channels.topic: The laws of the guild. Ignorance is no defense.

channels.name: tomes-of-lore
channels.topic: The world, its history, its horrors. Penned by the Lorekeepers.

channels.name: hall-of-records
channels.topic: Post your character: name, lineage, deeds, doom. One soul per entry.

channels.name: tavern-talk
channels.topic: Out of character. Speak freely, traveler.

channels.name: bardic-circle
channels.topic: Art, song, and verse. Share your craft.

channels.name: merchants-row
channels.topic: Wares, trades, and promotions. The Wardens watch for swindlers.

channels.name: quest-board
channels.topic: Seek companions. Plot your threads. Post your hooks.

channels.name: crossroads-inn
channels.topic: Drop-in roleplay. No application, no homework. Walk in and begin.

channels.name: the-shadowfen
channels.topic: A drowned forest where the dead whisper. Long-form RP.

channels.name: ashen-wastes
channels.topic: What remains after the Sundering. Long-form RP.

channels.name: citadel-of-glass
channels.topic: Seat of the old empire. Intrigue RP. Mind your tongue.

channels.name: wardens-log
channels.topic: Actions taken and why. Write it down.
